description: Nice upgrade to our Jumpseller Store and lead generation.
author: Filipe B.
pros: Ease of use. We appreciate a lot the ease integration with Mailchimp.
cons: Color adjustment to our brand ACF-50 SHOP.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A Great service for lead generation
description: A Great service for lead generation, copliancy banners, user message and so on. easy to use and have many features.
author: Tal S.
pros: I've been using tham for more than 5 years now for gettingt emails on travel websites. They packed many features in a single comfortable system, from which you can control many websites. And customer service is also always quick using their chat.
cons: On the begining there were some disaply bugs but it was always addresssed quickly and then solved during the time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: My overall experience with Poptin has been great. It is easy to use and helps boost conversions. I recommend
author: Yaron H.
pros: Quite Easy to understand and flexible, making it a great choice for teams of all users and skill levels.
cons: Sometimes the documentation is not clear enough, which can make it harder to get started quickly enough.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Works fairly well good for the price you pay.
author: Stephen S.
pros: Inexpensive, fairly easy to use some decent control over design elements.
cons: Had several issues with mobile editing messing up desktop popup format. When switching back and forth it would make everything change and overlap. I had to make 2 separate popups one for desktop one for mobile because of it. Would like more control over design elements.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our experience with Poptin has been extremely positive. It’s become a valuable tool for growing and managing our email database, and the insights we get from the analytics have strengthened our digital strategy. The platform is reliable, easy to navigate, and has delivered real results for us. We’d confidently recommend Poptin to organisations looking to improve lead capture and conversion.
author: Crystal R.
pros: Poptin has been incredibly easy to use from day one. The setup process was straightforward and quick, and we were able to install it on our website without any issues. We use Poptin to track and convert leads into our email database, and it’s made a noticeable difference in how effectively we capture and understand audience engagement. We especially love the analytics and reporting features. Having clear, accessible data on impressions, conversions and performance has helped us make more informed decisions about our campaigns and optimise our messaging. The platform strikes a great balance between being powerful and intuitive, which is ideal for a busy team.
cons: There are so many features and customisation options that it can take a bit of time to explore everything, but this is more a reflection of how much functionality the platform offers rather than a drawback.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: The best popup software with great triggering options
description: I love it. It's a great product, far better than others and the support is A+! I'm 99.9% sure you'll love Poptin.
author: Jimmy F.
pros: Their triggering attributes are the absolute most complete of any (of the many) tools I tested before deciding to sign up to Poptin. The ability to trigger based on a users interaction with another popup, or by their cookies or by custom JavaScript is tremendous!
cons: The UI could use a polish, but by no means is this a deal breaker. I'd much rather have a medium UI and tons of control over the triggering conditions than an amazing UI with very limited functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Poptin is a fantastic program, but what truly blew me away was their customer service. I consider myself a computer novice, and I was worried about getting stuck. Every single time I had a question, their helpdesk responded in what felt like seconds. Their explanations were so patient and clear that I never felt lost. Thank you!
author: Jan B.
pros: What impressed me most was how Poptin enabled us to implement a pop-up that is fully compliant with German regulations. The fact that this could be done on our Strato/ePages webshop, was the key deciding factor for us.
cons: I have no significant complaints. My experience was smooth. The only 'least' part was me taking a little time to explore all the possibilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy plug-and-play format makes edits easy
description: I struggled with another pop-up plugin for over a week before I recreated the intended result with Poptin in about an hour. It doesn't get any better than that.
author: Brett A.
pros: Easy-to-edit interface let me be precise in how I wanted to arrange elements.
cons: Mobile and desktop needed to be edit separately. Of course, I may have needed to wait until desktop was finished before turning on the mobile version.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Creating Our First Popup with Poptin
description: My overall experience with Poptin has been great. The platform is easy to use, even for beginners, and I was able to create and publish my first popup for FiegenPay without any issues. I also really appreciate the fact that it integrates directly into Google Tag Manager.
author: Michael F.
pros: It’s easy to set up and very user-friendly, even for someone with limited experience. I like that I can customize the popup quickly and integrate it without any technical issues. Also, the visual editor makes it very intuitive.
cons: So far, I haven’t found anything that I dislike. Everything has worked smoothly. If I had to mention something, it might be that there are a lot of options, which can be a bit overwhelming at first.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Service from the Chat Team
description: They have helped us remedy an issue with traffic that allowed us to keep our functionality with no questions asked.
author: Rob H.
pros: Ease of use is amazing. The layout and code snippet is so easy to use with your website. This makes utilizing pops a breeze and I highly recommend Poptin.
cons: Webpage count, although this is probably the way we are using it. They helped the way it is calculated, and it became a non-issue without any questions asked.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The overall experience with Poptin has been awesome. They have great forms and pop ups. Their customer service is wonderful.
author: Emily A.
pros: Poptin has great products and service. I recommend it.
cons: We wish there was a better mobile/phone exit intent pop up functionality, but what Poptin has may be the best that is technologically possible on mobile currently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive, found it to be a really useful tool that allows us to impart information to our customer quickly and cleanly.
author: Allistair B.
pros: Really easy to use, quick, clean and impactful way to engage with customers. Support team are super helpful and solved any problems with minimum fuss.
cons: In our busiest month, in the run up to Christmas, we get dangerously close to the monthly limit - other than that, it has been a positive experience all round.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I use it monthly, and I can get assistance with everything quickly. It's very easy to use, and it offers services that I do not need special programming for
author: Liron G.
pros: It's easy to use, the tech support is fast and helpful. I can receive easy enough fixes to problems .
cons: it can be basic at times; some features are not relevant to my platform. In the future, this may change.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Angela G.
pros: I really like the designs and the fast support.
cons: I can't think of something I don't like about Poptin.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Jerry P.
pros: - a ready-to-use tool to create a popup or enquiry form - User-friendly UI which allows non-tech user to setup
cons: - lack of proper bot detection or repeated user which cause of a lot of traffic - lack of API support
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Swati S.
pros: ease of lead form creation and automation url based.
cons: Cost could be heavy if you are managing multiple websites
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Took a chance on a free plugin and it really worked well. I have upgraded some of my sites to the paid versions as well.
author: Robert P.
pros: Templates are great and the chat tech support is awesome. The capabilities and analytics are excellent.
cons: Some of the settings are not super clear but the chat support is very helpful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is an excellent program, with a friendly chatline. very helpful.
author: Myles M.
pros: Easy to use, even a dummy could create a pop-up.
cons: I have not found anything I do not like yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Works on any website, even the ones that run on a lesser known/less conventional CMS. It is easy to install, design and edit pop-ups. Overview and summaries are also very clear.
author: Kimberly N.
pros: Easy and intuitive. Modern and clean look and feel.
cons: Could only use one domain, but that has changed now!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: It's the second time I use Poptin and it has been great again!
description: I used Poptin in my previous company some years ago and the experience was so good that I had to bring it to my new company! This time I had some issues at the beginning with a platform bug, which caused some delay in the popup launch, but nothing big and the support team was super helpful. After that, the Exit Intent popup has been great for us in converting visitors into subscribers.
author: Jessica A.
pros: - It's super easy to implement the popups - The support team is extremely responsive and helpful when you need them
cons: Nothing, everything has been great so far
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best option at the meantime on Thinkific platform
author: Paulius S.
pros: Great support and huge variety of options.
cons: Succeeded install on Thinkific with support.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Effective on Mobile Devices, Less So on Desktop
description: Thank you! My experience with Poptin and your support has been excellent so far. The support team has been very helpful in addressing any questions or issues I've had.
author: Athiban M.
pros: The tools are working well on mobile devices, in my opinion.
cons: What I liked least about Poptin was that it didn't fully meet my expectations on desktop devices, even though it works well on mobile.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Elina O.
pros: That it's free and simple to use, and the cs is helpful.
cons: The data is not too accurate, or maybe I'm not using it properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Suraj L.
pros: The tool provides plethora of options to creative slide-in and exit popup. There is literally no limits to customizations.
cons: Nothing as such. The UI can be more modern.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Easy to use and works fine, good templates
author: Michel T.
pros: Easy to use, great options and good layout
cons: It is in Englisch, not Dutch that would be easier
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
